since_last: 58% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +5.30%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 58% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.22% · BTC +0.59% · Gold +1.84% · Nasdaq100 -0.38%. 58% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +5.30%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +5.30%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.52%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: NOW is the standout at +8.27%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +8.27%, MGNI +8.14%, PUBM +7.98%, DV +7.84%, APP +7.50%. Laggards: TER -6.76%, HPE -6.65%, VRT -6.36%, NXPI -5.61%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.77% at $157.24
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.77% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
